{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032316134008286A5E7ACD7443CF92"}"},"total":3245},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7294512927456461603","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"四星给天道，肉嘟嘟还挺可爱的，算是比较有意思的设定。两天的通勤时间看到300章，后面其实有点索然了，特别是收了银川之后，战力系统崩坏，打脸环节也比较相似了；反而是人世间的几十年比较有意思。","text_exts":[{"e":84,"s":81,"text":"人世间","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BA%BA%E4%B8%96%E9%97%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742536207443CF92%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227294512927456461603%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227143160764428192783%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BA%BA%E4%B8%96%E9%97%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1698387821,"group_id":"7143160764428192783","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0yJ8wT5XiZolGOjrJD/fCQ=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8f567a8503234b6c96d673d049ccdaea~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796193&x-signature=a%2F2P31aFh%2FrbFN6eQ3wVhkdFzbU%3D","user_id":"932038109575055","user_name":"不看完怎么能睡觉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"932038109575055","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7143160764428192783","book_info":{"abstract":"【永生+咸鱼+无女主+无敌+挂机变强】
穿越到内卷修仙世界世界。
李奇绑定“咸鱼系统”，获得永生不死buff。
只要一直活着，每天就可以获得随机属性点。
实力不够不要紧，先小小的苟一段时间。
……
“就你是金丹老怪是吧？”
“等我百年，百年后干碎你！”
……
“就你叫仙人啊？”
“百年不够，有本事等千年之后，我们再碰一碰！”
……
“嘶！竟然是仙帝强者！惹不起你我苟得起！先来个一亿年！看谁熬死谁！”
……
谁在称无敌，哪个言不败？
“你们寿命有我长？没有就全部给爷跪下来唱征服！不然你们死后坟头都给我小心点！打不过你，打你孙子还是绰绰有余！”
坐看纪元更迭。
直至亿万纪元之后，连昔日大帝都寿元耗尽，神魂崩塌，不知换了多少轮。
唯有李奇依旧是当初那个李奇，永恒不变。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dd7d61332476c3945508355bb9873f8c","author":"真正的康总","author_id":"","book_id":"7143160764428192783","book_name":"长生：一天一加点，出山既无敌","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0e0e0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7143182330901987873","read_count":"10452","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1019408"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"494","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,无敌,架空,东方玄幻,打脸,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/139f015df74cd81fe44f57d71cbc9fff~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779437620&x-signature=YM%2BfzPgIQzadQT6UpH2KVWfRW3U%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"104699544622","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.93721e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032316134008286A5E7ACD7443CF92"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":19371,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1370},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7186507933210428193","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"emmmm，有人觉得男主多管闲事，有人觉得不符咸鱼人设，可是我觉得（我还是看救世主文学吧，男主我喜欢多来事的。）如果真的咸鱼🐟那有什么好看的，一句话，男主长生，隐世长修，最后无敌 。这个没什么好看的吧？"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1673239402,"group_id":"7143160764428192783","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2053531455982109"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7143160764428192783","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.9987182e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":19987,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7185204701779395331","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我觉得还好，是可以看下去的，而且还有一定的吸引度。虽然男主很躺平，但是该出手就出手，对宁休臣是我没想到的（这个朋友是出其不意了）我认为宁家没落算是大景王朝的前风，在景合王叹气的时候我就知道了。唉，有种时代不停变迁，岁月忽已暮，无旧人。哈哈哈，我就喜欢点评书拿读后感写。","text_exts":[{"e":112,"s":107,"text":"岁月忽已暮","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%B2%81%E6%9C%88%E5%BF%BD%E5%B7%B2%E6%9A%AE&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742536207443CF92%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227185204701779395331%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227143160764428192783%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%B2%81%E6%9C%88%E5%BF%BD%E5%B7%B2%E6%9A%AE%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1672936117,"group_id":"7143160764428192783","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"朱砖青瓦楼阁处，柳垂池间叶下鱼","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+fXvLHUIr9G8UhRZ3pJWYawvkHSL20IWMCy92e/dOww","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/765b97cf29534b40b326bebeb98ae976~tplv-s85hrik 另外，希望作者能看到这句话：尽快去向她表白吧，不要等达到什么什么目的了再去，有些人等等就后悔终生了；至于生活品质不仅仅是物质方面的，更是有很多因素组成，而且物质方面的提升，反而是比较好改变的；加油💪，听哥一句劝！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1681842747,"group_id":"7143160764428192783","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N19GYEz+XJl7gR8vYjTVQN4=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"111306855980","user_name":"中环的汤姆克鲁斯"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111306855980","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7143160764428192783","book_info":{"abstract":"【永生+咸鱼+无女主+无敌+挂机变强】
